message:
fix: csv/json readers infer types from all rows, not just first 256

Previously, type inference sampled only the first 256 rows. A column
with integers in rows 1-256 but floats in row 257+ would be typed as
int64, truncating later values. JSON reader also missed keys that first
appeared after row 256.

Both readers now iterate all rows for type inference since the full
dataset is already in memory. Added 6 tests covering late-row type
changes and late-appearing JSON keys.
